function.name: fem_2d_check_converge_cfl
function.description: Conduct a 2D Finite Element Method (FEM) simulation and evaluate temporal resolution convergence by halving cfl (*0.5). This experiment will conduct both FEM solving and convergence testing in one function. It will return {"refined_parameter": str, "current_value": float, "refined_value": float, "avg_energy_diff": float, "is_converged": bool, "accumulated_cost": int, "The cost of the solver simulating the environment": int, "The cost of the solver verifying convergence (This will not be included in your accumulated_cost)": int, "current_energy_metrics": dict, "refine_energy_metrics": dict, "wall_time_exceeded": bool}.
